name: commit-commands
description: Automate Git and GitHub publish workflows from Codex with grouped conventional commits and optional PR creation.

interface.shortDescription: Commit, push, and open PRs with grouped conventional commits
interface.longDescription: Use Commit Commands to publish local changes with grouped conventional commits, optional branch creation, `pr.md` generation, and ready GitHub pull requests without Codex attribution in branch names or commit copy.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Commit Commands to publish current changes with commit-push or commit-push-pr using grouped conventional commits.
